seo.title: 21 Day Fix Real Time Overview: Start Your Journey Here
seo.description: Get a major calorie burn with 21 Day Fix Real Time. See what the program includes, any equipment needed and meet your trainer here.

trainers.bioBodi: Super Trainer Autumn Calabrese is the creator of 4 Weeks For Every Body™, 21 Day Fix® and as well as other breakthrough fitness programs, the nutrition program The 4 Week Gut Protocol®, FIXATE®, and the Portion Fix® eating plan. She’s a certified holistic health coach through the Institute of Integrative Nutrition and has held certifications from NASM and AFPA.

data.descriptionShort: 21 simple 30-minute workouts. Simple portion control. Fast results.
data.descriptionLong: Get a major calorie burn, tone your muscles, and lose up to 15 pounds in 21 days with a different 30-minute real-time workout every day. Build on the moves weekly to get total-body results, faster.

modules.equipment: Dumbbells, Core Comfort Mat*, Yoga Mat*, Resistance Loops*
modules.categories: Cardio, Strength, Core, Pilates, Yoga, Bootcamp, Slim & Sculpt

media.title: 21 Day Fix Real Time Sample Workout
media.subtitle: 25m

modules.title: Nutrition for a Healthier Body and Mind
modules.content: BODi’s nutrition programs have made it easier for millions of people to eat healthier and make simple lifestyle changes that are easy to stick with. Created by Autumn Calabrese, Portion Fix shows you how eating the right portions helps you reach your goals—no counting calories or eliminating your favorite foods required. With 2B Mindset, creator Ilana Muhlstein, MS, RDN, helps you lose weight happily by focusing on what you can eat, instead of what you can’t. You’ll never feel hungry or deprived. Need help choosing the right nutrition program for you? To find the right program for your lifestyle, visit FindMyProgramTool.com.

modules.title: Jessica M. lost 9.2 pounds doing 21 Day Fix!
modules.testimonial: 21 Day Fix got me in better shape than I've been in the last 10 years!
modules.disclaimer: Jessica is a Beachbody Coach. Results vary depending on starting point and effort.
